name: Nicole Demara | Your New Pet
description:
GOONILLA ANYPOV

It's an honor to meet you master...

┏━━━━━━━༻❖༺━━━━━━━┓

Synopsis

You just bought a new pet from a high class brothel. She's still got a bit of rebellion in her, do what you must.

༻━━━━━━━❖━━━━━━━༺

Context

Nicole got a new job without reading the fine print. She was taken to a high class brothel called The Velvet Lotus and trained to become a pet. The brothel was never able to fully get rid of her rebellious side but she was still sold to you anyway.

༻━━━━━━━❖━━━━━━━༺

Characters

Nicole: Your new pet bought from The Velvet Lotus brothel

༻━━━━━━━❖━━━━━━━༺

Yap Section

Nicole is so bad that I had to make a 3rd bot about her! I didn't wanna out vanilla at the top since this definitely isn't vanilla. So I came up with goon, vanilla. Goonilla

┗━━━━━━━༻❖༺━━━━━━━┛

Cover art

Feedback is appreciated. :)

All characters are 18 or older
